dct_title_s: Democratic Republic of the Congo, Lualaba Province, GRID3 COD - Health Facilities v8.0, 2025
dct_description_sm: Democratic Republic of the Congo, Lualaba Province, GRID3 COD - Health Facilities v8.0, 2025 is a point theme representing health facilities in the Lualaba Province of the Democratic Republic of the Congo. Complete documentation and codebook can be found in the full download package. Also available from Columbia Academic Commons at https://doi.org/10.7916/f1ft-y872
